enumerate_node_list:
enum vax_regnum
{
  VAX_R0_REGNUM,
  VAX_R1_REGNUM,
  VAX_AP_REGNUM = 12,		/* Argument pointer on user stack.  */
  VAX_FP_REGNUM,		/* Address of executing stack frame.  */
  VAX_SP_REGNUM,		/* Address of top of stack.  */
  VAX_PC_REGNUM,		/* Program counter.  */
  VAX_PS_REGNUM			/* Processor status.  */
}
